metadata.title: Safety Baby — Home Safety Evaluation
metadata.description: Evaluate your home safety conditions for your baby through AI-powered photo analysis

onboarding.tagline: Protect your little one before accidents happen

slide1.title: Did You Know?
slide1.stat1Label: children under 5 are injured at home each year
slide1.stat3Label: cause of injury in children is falls at home

slide2.title: Prevention Saves Lives
slide2.description: A simple home evaluation can identify hidden dangers in your everyday spaces — from loose cords and sharp edges to toxic products within reach.
slide2.point1: Kitchen hazards: hot surfaces, sharp objects, chemicals
slide2.point2: Bathroom risks: slippery surfaces, drowning hazards
slide2.point3: Bedroom dangers: suffocation risks, fall hazards
slide2.point4: Living room: furniture tip-overs, small objects

slide3.title: Let's Evaluate Your Home
slide3.description: Take 4 simple photos of your rooms and our AI will analyze potential risks based on your baby's stage.

stages.title: Select Your Baby's Stage
stages.subtitle: We'll customize the evaluation based on your baby's developmental phase

pregnancy.title: Pregnancy
pregnancy.description: Preparing the home for your baby's arrival
pregnancy.details: Focus on nursery setup, air quality, chemical storage, and general home preparation

newborn.title: Newborn
newborn.description: Critical safety for your new baby
newborn.details: Focus on safe sleep environment, SIDS prevention, temperature control, and hygiene

firstSteps.title: First Steps
firstSteps.details: Focus on baby-proofing, fall prevention, electrical safety, and choking hazards

photos.title: Photograph Your Rooms
photos.subtitle: Take a clear photo of each room — try to capture the full space

roomTips.bedroom: Include the crib/bed area, windows, outlets, and floor
roomTips.kitchen: Show countertops, cabinets, stove, and floor area
roomTips.bathroom: Capture the tub/shower, toilet, sink, and floor
roomTips.living: Include furniture, TV area, floor, and accessible shelves

results.title: Your Safety Report
results.additionalPhotosDesc: We found areas that need closer inspection

unlock.title: Unlock Full Report
unlock.description: You're seeing {free} of {total} findings. Get the complete report with all findings and detailed recommendations.

features.detailed: Detailed action steps for each finding

paywall.title: Complete Your Purchase
paywall.subtitle: Unlock your full Safety Baby report
paywall.name: Cardholder Name
paywall.successDesc: Your full report is now unlocked

additional.title: Additional Photos Needed
additional.subtitle: Our analysis found areas that need closer inspection for a more accurate evaluation
